title: The Sound of Distant Traffic
content: Late at night, while the apartment remained dark and quiet, Olivia often listened to the distant sound of traffic drifting through the open window. Cars moved somewhere far below like a constant river of noise flowing endlessly through the city. Strangely, she found the sound comforting rather than irritating. It reminded her that life continued beyond the walls of her small apartment — thousands of strangers traveling home, working late shifts, or searching for somewhere to belong. Sometimes Olivia lay awake for hours simply thinking while the distant traffic blended into the background like quiet waves. In those moments, the city no longer felt overwhelming. Instead, it felt strangely human and alive.
